$comment: Per-series harvest lists for the Harvest tab. One entry per weekend; the app resolves the weekend by dinner date. Checkbox state lives in the per-dinner Firestore doc (state.harvest), so each date keeps its own picked/unpicked record. Edit items here + redeploy to change the list.

weekends.label: June 6-7
weekends.intro: Pick fresh each morning. Sunday is a repeat of Saturday.

items.name: Salanova lettuces
items.note: salad base · mix of the red and green heads

items.name: Young sorrel
items.note: whole leaves for the salad, plus chiffonade for the bites and the pork plate

items.name: Fennel fronds
items.qty: a couple of big handfuls per night

items.name: Rose petals
items.note: pavlova garnish · the rose sugar is already made

items.name: Honeysuckle blossoms
items.note: pavlova garnish, plus extra if we steep syrup at the farm

confirm.name: Fire cider
confirm.note: about 2 cups a night, strained · this weekend and next, covered through June 14

weekends.footnote: No spring onions needed this weekend, they come up from the restaurant. Any you have can go down for next week.

weekends.label: June 13-14
weekends.intro: Pick fresh each morning. Sunday is a repeat of Saturday.

items.note: pavlova garnish · the rose sugar is already made

items.name: Honeysuckle blossoms
